available_memory_mb.description: Amount of memory allocated to the Cloud Function, specified in megabytes; must be one of the supported values (e.g., 128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048, etc.).

build_environment_variables.description: Defines key-value pairs for environment variables that will be available during the build process of the Cloud Function.

build_service_account.description: Service account used to execute the build process for the Cloud Function; must have appropriate permissions for Cloud Build.

build_worker_pool.description: Specifies the Cloud Build worker pool to use for building the function, must be in the same project and region as the function.

description.description: Detailed description of the Cloud Function's purpose and functionality.

docker_registry.description: Specifies the Docker registry hosting the container image, such as 'gcr.io', 'us-docker.pkg.dev', or 'eu.gcr.io'.

docker_repository.description: Specifies the Docker repository URL for the container image used by the Cloud Function; must be a valid repository in the format `gcr.io/project-id/image`.

entry_point.description: Specifies the name of the function to execute, required to match the exported function name in the source code.

environment_variables.description: Specifies key-value pairs for environment variables to configure the Cloud Function, with a maximum of 4 KB in total size.

event_trigger.description: Defines the event that triggers the Cloud Function, specifying the event type and resource.

https_trigger_security_level.description: Specifies the security level for HTTPS trigger, determining whether requests from unverified sources are allowed.

https_trigger_url.description: URL endpoint for the HTTPS-triggered Cloud Function, automatically generated after deployment.

ingress_settings.description: Determines the connectivity options for the function, specifying whether it allows internal traffic, external traffic, or both.

kms_key_name.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key used to encrypt function environment variables, must be in the same region as the function.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the Cloud Function, such as environment or team identifiers. Maximum 64 labels per resource.

max_instances.description: Specifies the maximum number of instances that can be running for the function, limiting scalability to control resource usage.

min_instances.description: Specifies the minimum number of function instances to keep idle, ensuring reduced cold starts; must be a non-negative integer.

name.description: Name of the Cloud Function, must be unique within the project and region.

runtime.description: Specifies the runtime environment for the Cloud Function, such as Node.js or Python. Must match one of the supported runtime versions.

secret_environment_variables.description: Specifies environment variables sourced from Secret Manager secrets, enabling secure storage and retrieval of sensitive data for the function.

secret_volumes.description: Defines the secret volumes configuration, specifying the names and paths for accessing secrets from Secret Manager within the Cloud Function.
secret_volumes.type: list(object({mount_path: string,project_id: optional(string),secret: string,versions: list(object({path: string,version: string}))}))

service_account_email.description: Email address of the service account to associate with the Cloud Function, granting it permissions to access resources.

source_archive_bucket.description: Specifies the Cloud Storage bucket containing the source code archive; must exist in the same project and region as the Cloud Function.

source_archive_object.description: Specifies the name of the object in the Cloud Storage bucket that contains the source code for the function; must be in the same project as the function.

source_repository.description: Specifies the Cloud Source Repository URL containing the function's source code; must be formatted as "https://source.developers.google.com/projects/{project_id}/repos/{repo_name}/moveable-aliases/{branch_or_tag}".

timeout.description: Maximum duration, in seconds, for the function execution; must be between 1 and 540 seconds.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for the cloud function's execution, specifying the maximum time allowed for the function to complete its process.

trigger_http.description: Determines whether the function is triggered via HTTP requests; must be set to true for HTTP-triggered functions.

vpc_connector.description: Specifies the VPC access connector to enable the function to connect to a VPC network; must be the name of an existing VPC connector.

vpc_connector_egress_settings.description: Defines the egress traffic behavior for the VPC connector, specifying whether traffic is routed only through the connector or uses the default internet route.
